_comment: Seed corpus for plato-semantic-search. POST the `vectors` array to /upsert. Text is auto-embedded by Workers AI (@cf/baai/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384-dim). metadata.domain (string) and metadata.wave (number) match the metadata indexes documented in SETUP.md / README.

vectors.text: Conservation laws in ternary logic: a C-language treatment of balanced ternary arithmetic and the invariants preserved under three-valued transformations.
Flux hyperbolic geometry on the Poincare disk: Lorentz boosts and Mobius transformations implemented in Rust with const generics.
GPU SIMD matrix multiplication kernels written in CUDA and Oxide for dense linear algebra workloads, with tiled shared-memory optimization.
Plato durable key-value store backed by Cloudflare Workers KV with read-through caching and eventual consistency semantics.
Bridge crate connecting Plato embeddings to Cloudflare Vectorize for approximate nearest neighbor search over cosine similarity.
A primer on three-valued logic: Kleene and Lukasiewicz semantics, truth tables, and conservation of tautologies across ternary algebras.
The Poincare disk model of hyperbolic geometry: geodesics, isometries, and the Lorentz inner product on the unit disk.
SIMD-accelerated dense matrix multiplication for CPU: AVX-512 and NEON intrinsics, cache blocking, and autotuning tile sizes.
Read-through caching patterns for Workers KV: stale-while-revalidate, edge regional caches, and cache-key design for hot keys.
Approximate nearest neighbor search with cosine similarity: HNSW indexing, quantization, and recall tradeoffs on Vectorize.
Lorentz transformations and relativistic boosts: the Lorentz group, invariant intervals, and hyperbolic rotations of Minkowski space.
Kleene's three-valued logic with unknown as a third truth value: strong and weak Kleene tables, applications to database null semantics.
